response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's MCP and agentic workflow focus. However, the resume shows limited explicit evidence of production GenAI delivery, RAG architectures, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or cloud-platform AI system design at the depth expected for a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer. Customer-facing technical-leadership experience is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Deep full-stack engineering experience across TypeScript/Node.js, distributed systems, and high-throughput services
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and technical community leadership
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Limited evidence of production GenAI solutions over 8+ years (AI work appears recent and infrastructure-focused)
No clear customer-facing/forward-deployed or technical discovery leadership experience with enterprise stakeholders
